scripts.subtree:pull:hello-uni-app-x: git subtree pull --prefix=src git@gitcode.com:dcloud/hello-uni-app-x.git alpha --squash -m 'chore: pull hello-uni-app-x'
scripts.subtree:pull:hello-uts: git subtree pull --prefix=examples/hello-uts https://github.com/dcloudio/hello-uts alpha --squash -m 'chore: update hello-uts'
scripts.subtree:pull:hello-uvue: git subtree pull --prefix=examples/hello-uvue https://github.com/dcloudio/hello-uvue alpha --squash -m 'chore: update hello-uvue'
